title: heliotropium scabridum
intro: Heliotropium scabridum, also known as Rough heliotrope or Rough heliotropium, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in digestion. Heliotropium scabridum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
